# Code Memory

Module ID: code-memory
Status: draft
Purpose: Trusted Sources, source versions, Logic Capsules, and audit events for private reusable code memory.
Entrypoint: src/index.ts
Check: pnpm --filter @microservices-sh/code-memory check:spec
Build: pnpm --filter @microservices-sh/code-memory build
Test: pnpm --filter @microservices-sh/code-memory test

Key files:
- migrations/0001_initial.sql owns code_memory_sources, code_memory_source_versions, code_memory_capsules, and code_memory_events.
- src/service/index.ts validates source and capsule mutations.
- src/adapters/d1.ts stores JSON fields as text for D1.
- src/adapters/memory.ts supports fast unit tests and local development.

Rules:
- Do not execute untrusted repo code.
- Do not expose private repo credentials through this module.
- Approved capsule search is the default retrieval path.
- Keep source provenance and constraints with every capsule.
